class.help: Mantiene los distintos Avisos que se mostraran en la WEB.
class.label: Avisos
class.name: AVISO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_aviso as oi_aviso, t0.c_aviso as c_aviso, t0.d_puesto as d_puesto, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.f_aviso as f_aviso, t0.l_publicar as l_publicar, t0.l_envio_mail_ok as l_envio_mail_ok, t0.f_envio_mail as f_envio_mail, SEC.policy, t0.c_aviso as CODE, t0.d_puesto as TEXT, t0.oi_provincia as oi_provincia FROM SDP05_AVISOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Avisos.AVISO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_aviso LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_aviso asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_aviso as oi_aviso, SEC.policy FROM SDP05_AVISOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Avisos.AVISO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_aviso LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_aviso asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Código de AFJP. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 30 caracteres.
attribute.label: Referencia
attribute.name: c_aviso

attribute.description: Fecha de Inactivación de la AFJP.
attribute.label: Fecha Alta
attribute.name: f_aviso

assosiation.description: Registra las entrevistas para los avisos
assosiation.label: Entrevistas de Avisos
assosiation.name: AVISO_ENTREVISTA

key.msg: Ya existe un Aviso con el código ingresado.
key.name: AK_SDP05_AVISOS

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Avisos.AVISO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Avisos.AVISO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP05_AVISOS.oi_aviso) as CNT from SDP05_AVISOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP05_AVISOS.oi_aviso={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP05_AVISOS.d_puesto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP05_AVISOS.c_aviso,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Retorna informacion sobre el aviso. Pueden agregarse campos.
resource.name: infoAviso

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT a.oi_aviso, a.c_aviso, a.f_aviso, a.f_cierre, a.d_mail, a.d_mail_alt_1, a.d_mail_alt_2, a.c_tipo, a.d_puesto FROM SDP05_AVISOS as a WHERE a.oi_aviso = {#SOURCE:@oi_aviso} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT cv.oi_cv, cv.d_ape_y_nom, cv.d_email FROM SDP01_CV as cv WHERE cv.l_maillist = \'1\' AND cv.c_estado = \'A\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PAR.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS AS PAR WHERE PAR.c_modulo = \'SDP\' and par.c_parametro = \'WebName\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT PAR.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS AS PAR WHERE PAR.c_modulo = \'SDP\' and par.c_parametro = \'WebURLPublica\'
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.name: ListarIds
resource.description: Devuelve todos los IDs de oi_personal que corresponden a las personas de la empresa que no estan muertas ni jubiladas

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT CV.oi_cv, REC.oi_reclutado FROM SDP01_CV as CV, SDP14_RECLUTADOS AS REC, SDP05_AVISOS AS AVISO JOIN AVISO.oi_aviso INNER REC.oi_aviso, REC.oi_cv INNER CV.oi_cv WHERE AVISO.c_estado = \'P\' OR AVISO.c_estado = \'R\' AND CV.c_estado = \'A\' AND REC.c_estado = \'V\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT AVI.f_aviso as FEC_PUBLI, AVI.c_aviso as COD, AVI.d_puesto as PUE, AVI.c_estado as EST, PROV.d_provincia as PROV, AVI.l_publicar as WEB, AVI.l_envio_mail_ok as ENV_MAIL FROM SDP05_AVISOS as AVI, ORG35_PROVINCIAS as PROV JOIN AVI.oi_provincia LEFT PROV.oi_provincia ORDER BY FEC_PUBLI DESC
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Recupera los datos de un aviso p
resource.name: QRY_GetAviso

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT EMPRESA.d_empresa as EMP_DES,EMPRESA.oi_empresa as EMP_VAL, PUE.oi_puesto as PUEST_VAL, PUE.d_puesto as PUEST_DES, AVI.d_puesto as DESC_AVISO, AVI.f_aviso as F_PUBLICA, AVI.f_cierre as F_FIN, AVI.o_aviso as DESC_PUESTO, AVI.l_publicar as WEB, AVI.c_sexo as SEXO, AVI.d_mail as MAIL1, AVI.d_mail_alt_1 as MAIL2, AVI.d_mail_alt_2 as MAIL3, AVI.l_vehiculo as VEHICULO, AVI.l_lic_conduc as LICENCIA, TIPO_JOR.d_tipo_jor_lab as TIPO_JOR, AVI.c_radicarse as DISP_R, AVI.c_viajar as DISP_V, AVI.l_envio_mail_ok as INFO_MAIL, AVI.f_envio_mail as FEC_MAIL, AVI.c_tipo, AVI.c_estado, JER.oi_jerarquia, JER.d_jerarquia, AREA.oi_area, AREA.d_area, PAIS.oi_pais, PAIS.d_pais, PROV.oi_provincia, PROV.d_provincia, LOC.oi_localidad, LOC.d_localidad, AVI.oi_tipo_jor_lab FROM SDP05_AVISOS as AVI, ORG04_PUESTOS as PUE, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMPRESA, SDP16_TIPOS_JORNADA as TIPO_JOR, SDP07_JERARQUIA as JER, SDP09_AREAS as AREA, ORG35_PAISES as PAIS, ORG35_PROVINCIAS as PROV, ORG19_LOCALIDADES as LOC JOIN AVI.oi_puesto LEFT PUE.oi_puesto, PUE.oi_empresa LEFT EMPRESA.oi_empresa, AVI.oi_tipo_jor_lab LEFT TIPO_JOR.oi_tipo_jor_lab, AVI.oi_jerarquia LEFT JER.oi_jerarquia, AVI.oi_area LEFT AREA.oi_area, AVI.oi_pais LEFT PAIS.oi_pais, AVI.oi_provincia LEFT PROV.oi_provincia, AVI.oi_localidad LEFT LOC.oi_localidad WHERE AVI.oi_aviso = {%= #FILTER:@oi_aviso%} ')/ROWS/ROW

method.label: Elimina un aviso por su oi.
method.name: DeleteAviso

attribute.label: Id de la oferta de jobs
attribute.name: oi_aviso_jobs

class.help: Registra las entrevistas para los avisos
class.label: Aviso Entrevista
class.name: AVISO_ENTREV
